variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 14588 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 14588 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 14588 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 206.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 188.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 159.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 585.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 575.0 mm, Height 3 (H3): 561.0 mm

variants.title: Donaldson P775945 Air Filter, Primary Konepac | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 14588
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P775945 Air Filter, Primary Konepac | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 14588
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P775945 Air Filter, Primary Konepac is designed to provide reliable performance in air filter, primary konepac applications. Built with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality and durability. Ideal for industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty environments, this component enhances system performance and longevity.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF4638 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 14588
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AF4638 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 14588
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF4638 air filtration products are designed to effectively reduce the amount of damage-causing dust and dirt particles that make their way into your equipment’s engine.  Every Fleetguard product meets or surpasses the quality and performance standards required by a new engine.
